Reanimation  

Description

1: Revive

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 150 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 6 Recast Time: 20
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: Yes Blockable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Corpse
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Game Description

Revives a slain ally. It takes some time for the recently revived to fully recover.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Reanimation

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Reanimation
ClassLevel
CLR12
PAL22
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (67)
  • Sold By (12)
  • Screenshots
Add Image

Merchants:


Abysmal Sea
  • Slewar Belsgog - 3gp 2sp 3cp

Ak'Anon
  • Clockwork Merchant - 2149, -373, -182 - 3gp 2sp 3cp

East Freeport
  • Quelolista Samautia - 3gp 2sp 3cp

Erudin
  • Selint Chency - 2pp 9sp 9cp

Neriak Third Gate
  • Myris N`Tan - 2pp 9sp 9cp

North Kaladim
  • Fettar Steelwield - 2pp 9sp 9cp

North Qeynos
  • Balhallia - 2pp 9sp 9cp

Rivervale
  • Slim Waterman - 2pp 9sp 9cp

The Plane of Knowledge
  • Cavalier Waut - 3gp 2sp 3cp
  • Vicar Ceraen - 3gp 2sp 3cp

The Rathe Mountains
  • Scribe Rikik - 3gp 2sp 3cp

West Freeport
  • Egasia Reenix - 3gp 2sp 3cp

# Dec 14 2015 at 4:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1687133823367
Scholar
21 posts
It's also sold in Ak'anon's Mines of Malfunction by "Clockwork Merchant (Cleric Spells)". Approximate Loc is +2150 -370. (I was unable to find it on any of the Merchants in the Abbey of Deep Musing.)
▲ Page top
No corpse left for expedient recovery
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2009 at 7:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1612138655588
View User Forum
Scholar
59 posts
Just a word of warning, when you use reanimation, there is no corpse left for expedient recovery, unlike shammy or druid call. Bummer, lost about 10% of a level to find that out.
▲ Page top
revive
QuoteReply
# Nov 05 2007 at 3:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591949839804
3 posts
there is no exp bonus...it just revives someone who died to save them the run back to the body.

# Mar 22 2007 at 6:47 AM Rating: Decent

This spell is NOT sold in Paineel, we just have to buy it in Freeport, Top floor of the Clerics guild, (You have to touch the secret elevator) From Egasia Reenix 1475.80, -1644.45, 16.77

4 posts
0xp this is the first spell that pallies get with no xp regain can be bought in the Temple of Marr in the top floor lady vendor all(don't recall name). Do you self a favor if you have pp buy all rezz spell from her she got them all I think may be not the last don't remember and the last is 90% we don't get 96% nor 100% which unfortunately is only cleric who get them

any exp. regen
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2003 at 1:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253839770
Scholar
47 posts
does anybody know if there is any percentage of exp. recieved from reanimation, and if so, how much

so confused
▲ Page top
RE: any exp. regen
QuoteReply
# Feb 23 2004 at 3:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800827955
View User Forum
23 posts
So all this will do is bring someone back to their corpse? Do they lose exp? Is it better than finding their own way back to corpse and looting it themselves? I dont get it.

Cinlaanye
22 Paladin
Saryrn Server
▲ Page top
RE: any exp. regen
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2004 at 5:09 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1704672973637
Guru
5,311 posts
This spell is all about speed, convenience and safety.

At low levels the experience you lose per death is minimal. Naked corpse runs can be dangerous (especially for a class without a regular "invisibility" spell). They seem to always take more time than you think they will.

Reanimate your group mate, patch them up and get back to killing. The experience they lost will be regained in no time.
▲ Page top
RE: any exp. regen
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2004 at 2:36 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591769902580
View User Forum
Sage
73 posts
Good points about patching up your groupmate to get them back to you quick. The spell is also very usefull for getting someone back to their body when they lose a duel, where they don't lose experience anyway. And if you need to summon someone in a zone that doesn't have CoH, you can do that by dueling, then 0% rezzing them where you need to set up camp.
▲ Page top
RE: any exp. regen
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2006 at 5:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591846766101
12 posts
Wow, that duelling tip is good to know! Thanks.
▲ Page top
RE: any exp. regen
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2006 at 7:21 AM Rating: Decent
Woofie
Sage
90 posts
problem with dueling deaths is you only get...i want to say 15 minutes to rez. possibly less, maybe even as low as 5.

this is why, for sky runs, we've asked people to just take a death from npcs then get a 96% from a cleric, so you have 3 hour rez window. they die, get a rez back to their corpse (with the XP), the (keyed) necro summons the corpse to the island they are going to, another (keyed) cleric rezzes them again to pull them to their corpse on the upper island (yes, you can do that :p)
▲ Page top
RE: any exp. regen
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2004 at 6:28 AM Rating: Default
Corydon
Scholar
140 posts
What's the point in dragging a corpse to the point I want somebody to rez at? He could have walked there on his own I guess...
▲ Page top
RE: any exp. regen
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2004 at 11:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791849211
139 posts
Imagine this... group you are going to join is already killing halfway across the zone from zonein with many many KoS/ see invis mobs between you and them. They have a rogue in group and a person capable of casting this rez. The rogue sneak/hide runs to you at ZI and duels you to death then drags your body to the group where you get rezzed. Nice, simple, no XP loss, no training the group.

This may be a rare occurance, but when the "group" you are going to is a guild raid and there are locked doors between you and them as well as dozens of nasty creatures and you happen to be in a zone with no call of the hero capability then it is great that a paladin can cast this on a freshly drug body to spare the clerics the time since hopefully they are busy healing people.

I hope that explains the point in dragging a corpse to a 0% rez. I'm glad you asked because you know if you didn't understand there were at least a dozen others that did not but didn't ask. =)
▲ Page top
RE: any exp. regen

I couldn't find this new line of rez spells in the regular cleric area of Ak'anon, but there is a merchant selling them down in the Tunnels of Torment in the evil cleric area - the merchant is on Dark Reflections faction, so beware!
